description: Immutable official Ecuador scopes used by RuleSpec-EC: the ECUAMOD v5.1 tranche-1 statute chain (LRTI Codificacion 26 with reforms to July 2021; Ley de Seguridad Social 2001; the March 2024 VAT-reform organic law) and the MIES Bono de Desarrollo Humano legal-basis policy record. First Ecuador cut; SOUTHMOD full-bundle program lane 2.
name: ec-rulespec-2026-07-22
